puzzle.title: The Sacred Absence
puzzle.intro: Beyond the dunes of time, there lies a tale of unwavering devotion and a trust so heavy that the soul carrying it could have broken. In a moment when the people turned toward folly and gold, one figure stood firm—calling them back, pleading for patience, and bearing the weight of a sacred promise. This is the story of one who was chosen as a helper, a vizier, and a guardian of faith during a sacred absence. Can you uncover the identity of this steadfast soul?
clues: I share the blood of a great prophet who was chosen to speak with Allah directly upon a sacred mount.
My sibling once pleaded with Allah for assistance in speaking clearly to a great oppressor.
I was chosen by Allah to stand beside my sibling as a helper and vizier.
Together we faced a tyrannical ruler who demanded to be called the highest of gods.
While my sibling communed with Allah upon the mountain, our people fashioned for themselves an idol from their gold.
I am the brother of Moses, appointed by Allah as his vizier, mentioned by name in the Quran.
puzzle.arabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَجَعَلْنَا مَعَهُۥٓ أَخَاهُ هَـٰرُونَ وَزِيرًۭا
puzzle.verse: And We had certainly given Moses the Scripture and appointed with him his brother Aaron as an assistant. (25:35)
